exceptions.reason: BulkActionBar renders role="region", not toolbar. That was the honest stopgap while the catalog had no toolbar pattern; now that toolbar exists, this is a real gap in the component, not the catalog.
The action buttons are plain elements in normal Tab order -- there is no roving tabindex, no single shared tab stop for the group.
No keydown handling at all; arrow keys do nothing.
No keydown handling at all; arrow keys do nothing.
